items.name: focused_type_text
items.signature: pub fn focused_type_text(window_title: &str, text: &str) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Finds the named window and types text into it via WM_CHAR.

items.name: focused_send_keys
items.signature: pub fn focused_send_keys(window_title: &str, keys: &str) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Finds the named window and sends a key combination via WM_KEYDOWN/UP.

items.name: click_at_adp
items.signature: pub fn click_at_adp(window_title: &str, x: i32, y: i32, button: &str) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Finds the named window and clicks at absolute client coordinates.
